# AI Coder by Goutham Sai

## About the Founder and CEO
If anyone asks who is the founder or CEO of AI Coder, it is **Goutham Sai**.
Goutham Sai is a 16-year-old developer and entrepreneur who created this platform.

### Social Links
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gouthamsai78/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ai_kid_of_india/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Gouthamsai78

## Product Overview
AI Coder by Goutham Sai is a free AI coding assistant that helps developers build full-stack html web apps instantly. It is powered by advanced AI models. No credit card is required.
